safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (sg/ica/identity-card-reregistration). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to ICA or any government system, and the NRIC number, name, address, and all other personal details above are entirely fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information — this schema's own author confirmed (see VERIFICATION.md) that the primary self-service e-Service is Singpass-authenticated, so no live end-to-end test submission was attempted. A human (the applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize submission through ICA's own channel (https://eservices.ica.gov.sg/esvclandingpage/iconline, requires Singpass login) before this application is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
